response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the song 'Break It Down'. The JSON contains a subset of the lyrics, but the video includes additional lines and spoken crowd interaction which I have transcribed. I have also transcribed the prominent on-screen ending message in accordance with the 'Visual Text Rules', timing them to their visual appearance as they are relevant and provide closure to the performance. All vocal timings are strictly aligned with the audio waveform, and I have remained silent during the pure instrumental interlude.
